SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript:
select
 YEAR_MTH_KEY as yearMonth
,MEMBER_ID as planMemberID
,MBI as beneficiaryID
,MEMBER_LAST_NAME as memberLastName
,MEMBER_FIRST_NAME as memberFirstName
,MEMBER_GENDER as memberGender
,MEMBER_DOB as memberDOB
,MEMBER_DOD as memberDOD
,MEMBER_DEATH_IND as memberDeathInd
,MEMBER_ADDRESS1 as memberAddress1
,MEMBER_ADDRESS2 as memberAddress2
,MEMBER_CITY as memberCity
,MEMBER_STATE as memberState
,MEMBER_ZIP as memberZip
,MEMBER_COUNTY as memberCounty
,MEMBER_PHONE as memberPhone
,MEMBER_EMAIL as memberEmail
,PLAN_ID as planID
,PRODUCT_NAME as productName
,PBP as pbp
,MEMBER_GROUP_NUMBER as memberGroupNumber
,MEMBER_GROUP_NAME as memberGroupName
,MEMBER_GROUP_CATEGORY as memberGroupCategory
,ATTRIBUTION_CLASS as attributionClass
,ENRL_MIN_BEGIN_DATE as enrlMinBeginDate
,ENRL_BEGIN_DT as enrlBeginDate
,ENRL_END_DT as enrlEndDate
,HOSPICE_IND as hospiceInd
,ESRD_IND as esrdInd
,INSTL_IND as instlInd
,RISK_SCORE_cMMR as riskScoreCMMR
,LIS_IND as lisInd
,RX_FLAG as rxFlag
,PO_ID as poCode
,PO_NAME as poName
,PU_ID as practiceCode
,PU_NAME as practiceName
,PROVIDER_ID as providerID
,NPI as providerNPI
,TIN as providerTIN
,PROVIDER_LAST_NAME as providerLastName
,PROVIDER_FIRST_NAME as providerFirstName
,PROVIDER_ADDRESS1 as providerAddress1
,PROVIDER_ADDRESS2 as providerAddress2
,PROVIDER_CITY as providerCity
,PROVIDER_STATE as providerState
,PROVIDER_ZIP as providerZip
,PROVIDER_COUNTY as providerCounty
,PROVIDER_EMAIL as providerEmail
,PROVIDER_PHONE as providerPhone
,PROVIDER_FAX as providerFax
,PROVIDER_TYPE as providerType
,PCMH as pcmh
,CURR_CVG_IND as currCvgInd
,PROVIDER_TAXONOMY as providerTaxonomy
,PROVIDER_SPECIALTY as providerSpecialty
,MEMBER_DO_NOT_CONTACT as memberDoNotContact
,ALT_MEMBER_ID9 as altMemberId9
,ALT_MEMBER_ID_CURR as altMemberIdCurr
,LOAD_DATE as sourceLoadDate
,hash(concat(
 ifNull(YEAR_MTH_KEY,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_ID,"")
,ifNull(MBI,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_LAST_NAME,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_FIRST_NAME,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_GENDER,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_DOB,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_DOD,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_DEATH_IND,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_ADDRESS1,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_ADDRESS2,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_CITY,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_STATE,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_ZIP,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_COUNTY,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_PHONE,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_EMAIL,"")
,ifNull(PLAN_ID,"")
,ifNull(PRODUCT_NAME,"")
,ifNull(PBP,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_GROUP_NUMBER,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_GROUP_NAME,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_GROUP_CATEGORY,"")
,ifNull(ATTRIBUTION_CLASS,"")
,ifNull(ENRL_MIN_BEGIN_DATE,"")
,ifNull(ENRL_BEGIN_DT,"")
,ifNull(ENRL_END_DT,"")
,ifNull(HOSPICE_IND,"")
,ifNull(ESRD_IND,"")
,ifNull(INSTL_IND,"")
,ifNull(RISK_SCORE_cMMR,"")
,ifNull(LIS_IND,"")
,ifNull(RX_FLAG,"")
,ifNull(PO_ID,"")
,ifNull(PO_NAME,"")
,ifNull(PU_ID,"")
,ifNull(PU_NAME,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_ID,"")
,ifNull(NPI,"")
,ifNull(TIN,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_LAST_NAME,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_FIRST_NAME,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_ADDRESS1,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_ADDRESS2,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_CITY,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_STATE,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_ZIP,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_COUNTY,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_EMAIL,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_PHONE,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_FAX,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_TYPE,"")
,ifNull(PCMH,"")
,ifNull(CURR_CVG_IND,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_TAXONOMY,"")
,ifNull(PROVIDER_SPECIALTY,"")
,ifNull(MEMBER_DO_NOT_CONTACT,"")
,ifNull(ALT_MEMBER_ID9,"")
,ifNull(ALT_MEMBER_ID_CURR,"")
,ifNull(LOAD_DATE,""))) as HashRowKey
from MA_MEMBERSHIP_STARS
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript:
MERGE INTO DestinationTable t
USING(SELECT * from tempSQLScript ) s
ON s.yearMonth = t.yearMonth
and s.planMemberID = t.planMemberID
WHEN MATCHED AND s.HashRowKey <> t.HashRowKey THEN UPDATE SET
 t.beneficiaryID=s.beneficiaryID
,t.memberLastName=s.memberLastName
,t.memberFirstName=s.memberFirstName
,t.memberGender=s.memberGender
,t.memberDOB=s.memberDOB
,t.memberDOD=s.memberDOD
,t.memberDeathInd=s.memberDeathInd
,t.memberAddress1=s.memberAddress1
,t.memberAddress2=s.memberAddress2
,t.memberCity=s.memberCity
,t.memberState=s.memberState
,t.memberZip=s.memberZip
,t.memberCounty=s.memberCounty
,t.memberPhone=s.memberPhone
,t.memberEmail=s.memberEmail
,t.planID=s.planID
,t.productName=s.productName
,t.pbp=s.pbp
,t.memberGroupNumber=s.memberGroupNumber
,t.memberGroupName=s.memberGroupName
,t.memberGroupCategory=s.memberGroupCategory
,t.attributionClass=s.attributionClass
,t.enrlMinBeginDate=s.enrlMinBeginDate
,t.enrlBeginDate=s.enrlBeginDate
,t.enrlEndDate=s.enrlEndDate
,t.hospiceInd=s.hospiceInd
,t.esrdInd=s.esrdInd
,t.instlInd=s.instlInd
,t.riskScoreCMMR=s.riskScoreCMMR
,t.lisInd=s.lisInd
,t.rxFlag=s.rxFlag
,t.poCode=s.poCode
,t.poName=s.poName
,t.practiceCode=s.practiceCode
,t.practiceName=s.practiceName
,t.providerID=s.providerID
,t.providerNPI=s.providerNPI
,t.providerTIN=s.providerTIN
,t.providerLastName=s.providerLastName
,t.providerFirstName=s.providerFirstName
,t.providerAddress1=s.providerAddress1
,t.providerAddress2=s.providerAddress2
,t.providerCity=s.providerCity
,t.providerState=s.providerState
,t.providerZip=s.providerZip
,t.providerCounty=s.providerCounty
,t.providerEmail=s.providerEmail
,t.providerPhone=s.providerPhone
,t.providerFax=s.providerFax
,t.providerType=s.providerType
,t.pcmh=s.pcmh
,t.currCvgInd=s.currCvgInd
,t.providerTaxonomy=s.providerTaxonomy
,t.providerSpecialty=s.providerSpecialty
,t.memberDoNotContact=s.memberDoNotContact
,t.altMemberId9=s.altMemberId9
,t.altMemberIdCurr=s.altMemberIdCurr
,t.sourceLoadDate=s.sourceLoadDate
,t.HashRowKey=s.HashRowKey
WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT
(
 yearMonth
,planMemberID
,beneficiaryID
,memberLastName
,memberFirstName
,memberGender
,memberDOB
,memberDOD
,memberDeathInd
,memberAddress1
,memberAddress2
,memberCity
,memberState
,memberZip
,memberCounty
,memberPhone
,memberEmail
,planID
,productName
,pbp
,memberGroupNumber
,memberGroupName
,memberGroupCategory
,attributionClass
,enrlMinBeginDate
,enrlBeginDate
,enrlEndDate
,hospiceInd
,esrdInd
,instlInd
,riskScoreCMMR
,lisInd
,rxFlag
,poCode
,poName
,practiceCode
,practiceName
,providerID
,providerNPI
,providerTIN
,providerLastName
,providerFirstName
,providerAddress1
,providerAddress2
,providerCity
,providerState
,providerZip
,providerCounty
,providerEmail
,providerPhone
,providerFax
,providerType
,pcmh
,currCvgInd
,providerTaxonomy
,providerSpecialty
,memberDoNotContact
,altMemberId9
,altMemberIdCurr
,sourceLoadDate
,HashRowKey
)
VALUES
(
 s.yearMonth
,s.planMemberID
,s.beneficiaryID
,s.memberLastName
,s.memberFirstName
,s.memberGender
,s.memberDOB
,s.memberDOD
,s.memberDeathInd
,s.memberAddress1
,s.memberAddress2
,s.memberCity
,s.memberState
,s.memberZip
,s.memberCounty
,s.memberPhone
,s.memberEmail
,s.planID
,s.productName
,s.pbp
,s.memberGroupNumber
,s.memberGroupName
,s.memberGroupCategory
,s.attributionClass
,s.enrlMinBeginDate
,s.enrlBeginDate
,s.enrlEndDate
,s.hospiceInd
,s.esrdInd
,s.instlInd
,s.riskScoreCMMR
,s.lisInd
,s.rxFlag
,s.poCode
,s.poName
,s.practiceCode
,s.practiceName
,s.providerID
,s.providerNPI
,s.providerTIN
,s.providerLastName
,s.providerFirstName
,s.providerAddress1
,s.providerAddress2
,s.providerCity
,s.providerState
,s.providerZip
,s.providerCounty
,s.providerEmail
,s.providerPhone
,s.providerFax
,s.providerType
,s.pcmh
,s.currCvgInd
,s.providerTaxonomy
,s.providerSpecialty
,s.memberDoNotContact
,s.altMemberId9
,s.altMemberIdCurr
,s.sourceLoadDate
,s.HashRowKey
)
